proceedBrief.embodies: Platform lead accountable for fleet reliability
proceedBrief.goalOrientationBrief:
## Goal orientation
**Fleet north star:** GR-T2 integrator pilot — live sovereign substrate + bank innovation pilots + continental capital rail
**Quarter:** Ship · surfaces · GTM · operational AI
**Head programme:** `PROG-CONTINENTAL-CAPITAL` → `markets-os`
**Repo north star:** Sovereign deploy substrate — EKS/staging, SECAS, fleet health, observability
**Milestone:** SECAS-S4-supply-chain
**Shippable:** SecOps internal Class R sealed; ComplianceOps harness PASS; vendor gates parallel only
**PRD refs:** prd-product-charter
**Product team:** Fabric OS (`platform-engineer`)

gateExplainer.preamble: **Not engineering or GTM roadmap work.** Vendor/auditor calendar artifacts — **blocksIR: false** — formal customer adoption track only; fabric-os witnesses calendar.

gates.what: Vendor pen-test report file arrives; operator authorizes ingest into fabric-os evidence path
gates.why: Agent cannot receive or ingest vendor security artifact before the execution window closes
gates.implication: No fleet-wide stop — bridge/agile/canon/product repos omit this gate; fabric-os continues Class R prep until report lands
gates.who: External pen-test vendor delivers report; fabric-os operator runs ingest ceremony
gates.unblockAction: Place vendor report JSON and run `pnpm secas:pentest:report:ingest -- --input=<vendor-report.json>` on or after 2026-06-21

gates.what: Vendor executes live-stack pen test during contracted calendar window
gates.why: Agent cannot pull forward vendor execution or receive report before window
gates.implication: Witness prep and friction checks continue; ingest blocked until report delivery

gates.what: SOC 2 Type I opinion letter from auditor
gates.why: Agent cannot countersign or synthesize auditor attestation
gates.when: Parallel track — not on SECAS pen-test calendar
gates.implication: Does not block pen-test window prep or fleet program office queue
gates.unblockAction: Auditor opinion letter to compliance evidence path

statusUpdateClosure.parallelSovereignGatesMarkdown:
**Not engineering or GTM roadmap work.** Vendor/auditor calendar artifacts — **blocksIR: false** — formal customer adoption track only; fabric-os witnesses calendar.

- **Class A** · `SECAS-S2-01-INGEST` · **What:** Vendor pen-test report file arrives; operator authorizes ingest into fabric-os evidence path · **Why:** Agent cannot receive or ingest vendor security artifact before the execution window closes · **Unblock:** Place vendor report JSON and run `pnpm secas:pentest:report:ingest -- --input=<vendor-report.json>` on or after 2026-06-21 · **When:** Earliest ingest 2026-06-21 (window 2026-06-17..2026-06-21) · **Implication:** No fleet-wide stop — bridge/agile/canon/product repos omit this gate; fabric-os continues Class R prep until report lands · **blocksIR:** false · **Does not block:** `SECAS-S2-01`
- **Class A** · `BG-10-10` · **What:** Vendor executes live-stack pen test during contracted calendar window · **Why:** Agent cannot pull forward vendor execution or receive report before window · **Unblock:** Vendor report delivery; ingest post 2026-06-21 · **When:** 2026-06-17..2026-06-21 · **Implication:** Witness prep and friction checks continue; ingest blocked until report delivery · **blocksIR:** false · **Does not block:** `SECAS-S2-01`
- **Class S** · `BG-10-11` · **What:** SOC 2 Type I opinion letter from auditor · **Why:** Agent cannot countersign or synthesize auditor attestation · **Unblock:** Auditor opinion letter to compliance evidence path · **When:** Parallel track — not on SECAS pen-test calendar · **Implication:** Does not block pen-test window prep or fleet program office queue · **blocksIR:** false · **Does not block:** `SECAS-S2-01`
